channel.title: Politics on Michael5Collins
channel.description: Recent content in Politics on Michael5Collins

item.title: Perth Vaccine Mandate Protest Sees Large Attendance
item.description: This Saturday's vaccine mandate protest saw over a thousand people attend, a considerably higher turnout than previous protests held elsewhere under lockdown conditions.

item.title: YouTube-DL Removed From GitHub After DCMA Notice
item.description: Friday night on the 23rd of October the ‘Recording Industry Association of America, Inc. (RIAA)’ sent a DMCA request to GitHub asking that the popular YouTube downloading software ‘youtube-dl’ be taken down.
